message:
test: pin spawn.h conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_posix_spawn.rs covering 6 functions:
- posix_spawn: /bin/true exits 0, /bin/false exits 1, nonexistent path
  produces consistent error
- posix_spawnp: PATH-relative "true" lookup
- posix_spawn_file_actions_init/destroy: 128B buffer round-trip
- posix_spawnattr_init/destroy: 384B buffer round-trip

7 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-spwn1
